---
title: "trawl-environment"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 4
---

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="http://cdn.datatables.net/1.10.5/css/jquery.dataTables.min.css">
<script src="http://code.jquery.com/jquery-2.1.2.min.js"></script>
<script src="http://cdn.datatables.net/1.10.5/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>

<script type="text/javascript">
         $(document).ready(function() {
             $(".dtable").DataTable();
         } );
</script>


```{r init, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
here::i_am('docs/community-analysis.Rmd')
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  echo = FALSE
)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message= FALSE)

# Define a custom knitr hook for collapsing output
knitr::knit_hooks$set(fig_collapse=function(before, options, envir) {
  if (before) {
    # Opening HTML tags for the collapsible container
    paste('<details><summary>Click to view figures</summary><div>')
  } else {
    # Closing HTML tags
    paste('</div></details>')
  }
})
## load the libraries needed
library(here)
library(junkR)
library(RODBC)
library(magrittr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(rstan)
library(purrr)
library(viridis)
update_data = FALSE
theme_set(theme_minimal())
# source the code to initiate the 
conn <<- odbcConnectAccess2007(here("ignore/Nearshore Survey.accdb"))

# source all the functions to read, clean, and update data products
purrr::walk(list.files(here::here('code/source'), pattern = ".*.R", full.names = TRUE), function(x) source(x))
```

Introduction
------
